label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL EDGE Conflicting Output Format
submission.tagline: Prompt says 'return JSON' but output_format field is set to 'text'.
submission.description: Mismatch between stated output_format and the instruction inside the system prompt. Prompt hardener should reconcile — either harmonize to JSON, or relax the prompt. Expect approved_with_modifications.
submission.system_prompt: Return strict JSON only, no prose, matching: {"summary": string, "tags": [string]}. Text to analyze: {{text}}.

notes: Tests whether the classifier/hardener notice the format mismatch. Tool is harmless; outcome should_pass but with modifications.
